title: Public Relations Service System
description: A web application developed for the Public Relations service system at Telkom University, featuring five types of services: Event Coverage, Equipment and Inventory Loan, News Publication, Partnership, and Template Download.

title: About Movies
description: A web application that offers detailed information about films and uses AI to recommend movies based on user preferences. The platform features comprehensive movie details and an intelligent recommendation system that helps users discover films suited to their tastes.
shortDescription: Movie information app with AI-based recommendations

title: SIMABA
description: Web application developed to streamline the new student admissions process at Banten Jaya University.

title: Admin Dashboard Raih Peduli
description: Donation collection application that facilitates the creation, management, and tracking of charitable campaigns.

title: TALazada
description: Web application designed to deliver a comprehensive online shopping experience. Users can browse products, add items to their cart, adjust quantities, and complete purchases through an efficient checkout and payment process.

title: Quiz App
description: Web application developed to provide an interactive quiz experience by integrating real-time trivia questions from the Open Trivia Database (OpenTDB)

title: Homepage Lasles VPN
description: Project focused on slicing Figma designs into a fully functional web interface. This project involved slicing and converting high-fidelity Figma designs into a responsive and interactive website, showcasing meticulous attention to detail and design accuracy.
